name: GitHub API
description: GitHub repos, PRs, issues, branches, code search via GitHub's official hosted MCP

env_vars.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with required scopes
env_vars.how_to_set: github.com → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Generate new token

tools.name: list_repos
tools.description: List repositories for the authenticated user or a specified organization, with sorting and filtering options

owner.description: GitHub username or organization name; defaults to authenticated user

type.description: Filter by repo type: all, owner, member, public, private

sort.description: Sort by: created, updated, pushed, full_name

tools.name: get_repo
tools.description: Get detailed information about a GitHub repository including stats, topics, and default branch

owner.description: The repository owner's GitHub username or org name

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new GitHub issue in a repository with title, body, labels, and assignees

owner.description: The repository owner's GitHub username or org name

body.description: Markdown body content of the issue

labels.description: List of label names to apply to the issue

assignees.description: List of GitHub usernames to assign to the issue

tools.name: list_pull_requests
tools.description: List pull requests for a repository filtered by state, base branch, or head branch

owner.description: The repository owner's GitHub username or org name

state.description: Filter by PR state: open, closed, or all

base.description: Filter by base branch name (e.g. main)

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories using GitHub's code search syntax

q.description: Code search query using GitHub search syntax (e.g. 'useState repo:facebook/react')
